Home / Section 5: Disclaimer & Contact
Section 5

Disclaimer & Contact

Disclaimer

The field of AI is evolving rapidly, and some resources listed in this repository may become outdated. This collection represents our ongoing effort to compile useful AI tools and resources for behavioural researchers. It is not definitive nor are we responsible/accountable for the use of external tools or resources signposted within it.

Contact

For inquiries about the contents of this webpage, please fill out our contact form (opens in Qualtrics), or email:

  • Dr. Guanyu Yang at guanyu.yang.20[@]ucl.ac.uk
  • Dr. Amy Rodger at A.Rodger[@]ed.ac.uk

(Email addresses are shown with [@] instead of @ to reduce spam — replace with @ when you email.)

Suggest a resource

This is a living repository. If you know of a useful tool, paper, course, or case study we should include, please tell us via the suggestion form.

Privacy

See the BR-UK Privacy Statement (PDF, 163 KB) for how we handle any personal data collected through this website and its forms.

About BR-UK

The Behavioural Research UK Leadership Hub is supported by the Economic and Social Research Council [Grant Number ES/Y001044/1].
